package.name: OrionFlow
package.description: OrionFlow — AI CAD copilot embedded in FreeCAD. Query, modify and reconstruct parametric models from natural language, grounded in real topology. Backed by the k2v2 think reasoning model.

workbench.name: OrionFlow
workbench.description: AI CAD copilot side panel: grounded Q&A, verified edits, and 2D-to-3D reconstruction.
